name: Werewolf Berserker
description:
Transform into a beast, fearing nearby enemies for 3 seconds. 

While transformed, your Light Attacks apply a bleed for 3716 Bleed Damage over 4 seconds, your Heavy Attacks deal their damage in an area, and your Max Stamina is increased by 30%.

While slotted, your Stamina Recovery is increased by 15%.
